hero.headline: Your Dream Backyard Built to Last
hero.subheadline: For over 40 years, Teserra has designed and built breathtaking pools and outdoor living spaces across the Coachella Valley and Orange County. From custom pools to complete backyard transformations, we handle every detail so you can enjoy the result.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Complete Outdoor Living<br class="hidden md:block"> Design & Construction
services.subtitle: From stunning custom pools to fully equipped outdoor kitchens, Teserra delivers every element of your dream backyard under one roof. No subcontractor runaround, no finger-pointing — just exceptional craftsmanship from start to finish.

cards.title: Custom Pool Construction
cards.description: Resort-style pools, intimate backyard retreats, and commercial aquatic facilities — designed and built from the ground up to match your vision and lifestyle.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Breathe new life into your existing pool with resurfacing, updated tile, modern equipment upgrades, and fresh design elements that transform the space.

cards.title: Outdoor Living Spaces
cards.description: Pergolas, shade structures, patios, and entertainment areas that extend your home into the outdoors. Designed for the desert climate and coastal breezes.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Fire Features
cards.description: Custom-built kitchens with grills, countertops, and storage, plus firepits and fireplaces for year-round outdoor entertaining under the California sky.

cards.title: Hardscape & Masonry
cards.description: Walkways, retaining walls, driveways, and decorative masonry veneer that tie your entire outdoor environment together with lasting quality.

cards.title: Artificial Grass & Putting Greens
cards.description: Premium synthetic turf for lawns, pet areas, playgrounds, and tour-quality putting greens — low maintenance, water-saving, and always green.

how_it_works.headline: From Vision to Reality in Three Steps

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Tell us about your dream outdoor space. We'll visit your property, discuss your goals and budget, and provide a detailed design concept — all at no cost to you.

steps.title: We Design & Build
steps.description: Our in-house design team creates your custom plan. Once approved, our licensed crews handle every phase of construction with weekly progress updates.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Retreat
steps.description: Step into your completed backyard paradise. Every project is backed by our craftsmanship warranty and the Google Guaranteed badge for your peace of mind.

about.label: Why Homeowners Choose Teserra
about.headline: 40+ Years Building Outdoor Living That Lasts
about.description: Since 1985, Teserra has been the most trusted name in outdoor construction across the Coachella Valley and Orange County. Our team brings decades of hands-on experience to every project, whether it's a custom pool, a complete backyard renovation, or a commercial facility. We treat every property like our own — because our reputation depends on it.

features.title: Licensed & Fully Insured
features.description: CA License #656128 with comprehensive insurance coverage. Every project is permitted and built to code — no shortcuts, no exceptions.

features.title: On-Time, On-Budget Delivery
features.description: We set a schedule and a price, and we stick to both. Our project management process keeps your build on track from groundbreaking to final walkthrough.

features.title: Full-Service, One Team
features.description: Design, engineering, construction, and finishing — all handled by Teserra. One point of contact, one accountable team, one exceptional result.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed written estimate upfront. We stand behind our numbers — no change-order games, no surprise invoices.

guarantee.headline: Our Craftsmanship Guarantee
guarantee.description: Every Teserra project is built to last and backed by our workmanship warranty. If anything we built doesn't meet the standard we promised, we'll make it right at no additional cost. That's the commitment that has earned us 204+ five-star reviews and the Google Guaranteed badge.

faqs.question: How long does a custom pool project take?
faqs.answer: Most residential pool builds take 8-14 weeks depending on complexity and permitting. We provide a detailed timeline upfront and keep you updated at every phase. Larger outdoor living projects with multiple elements may take longer, and we'll always give you an honest estimate.

faqs.question: Do you serve both Coachella Valley and Orange County?
faqs.answer: Yes! We have teams operating across both regions. In the Coachella Valley, we serve Palm Springs, Palm Desert, La Quinta, Rancho Mirage, Indian Wells, and surrounding cities. In Orange County, we cover Irvine, Newport Beach, Huntington Beach, Anaheim, and more.

faqs.question: Can you work within my budget?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our designers are skilled at creating stunning outdoor spaces across a wide range of budgets. During your free consultation, we'll discuss your priorities and design a plan that maximizes impact within your investment range — no pressure, no upselling.

faqs.question: What makes Teserra different from other contractors?
faqs.answer: Over 40 years of experience, a full in-house team (no subcontractor shuffle), the Google Guaranteed badge, and a track record of on-time, on-budget delivery. We've built thousands of projects and our 4.6-star rating across 204+ reviews speaks for itself.

faqs.question: Do you handle permits and HOA approvals?
faqs.answer: Yes, we manage the entire permitting process and can assist with HOA submissions. Our team is familiar with local building codes across both Coachella Valley and Orange County jurisdictions, so nothing falls through the cracks.

testimonials.name: Tim H.
testimonials.text: Teserra was terrific to work with and built a beautiful pool and yard in what we felt was a timely manner. We highly recommend both Adam and the entire Teserra team!

testimonials.name: Delanda C.
testimonials.text: I had 7 bids and chose Teserra because Ryan was very informative about every aspect of my pool remodel — more so than any of the other companies. Best decision I made.

testimonials.name: Brian S.
testimonials.text: We are so thrilled with our Teserra pool. Adam was great to work with and the on-site manager was terrific. The project was on time and on budget and we have a beautiful pool.

contact.subtitle: Get a free design consultation and project estimate. No pressure, no obligation — just honest guidance from a team with 40+ years of experience.
